zh.lifeSummary: 當John Vaughan於1405年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾度斯利時，他的父親Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine28歲，母親Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam21歲。他和Ellen Gethin de FitzAlan至少有1個女兒。他去世於1457年在英國賀福爾賀福德享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Vaughan于1405年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾度斯利时，他的父亲Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine28岁，母亲Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam21岁。他和Ellen Gethin de FitzAlan至少有1个女儿。他去世于1457年在英国賀福爾賀福德享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Vaughan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

variants.name: Von
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Veon
meanings: Possibly an altered form of Welsh   Vaughan  .

variants.name: Vaughns
meanings: Welsh: variant of Vaughan , with English patronymic -s.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Vaughan was born in 1405, in Dursley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine, was 28 and his mother, Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, was 21. He had at least 1 daughter with Ellen Gethin de FitzAlan. He died in 1457, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Vaughan est né en 1405, à Dursley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Ellen Gethin de FitzAlan. Il est décédé en 1457, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Vaughan 1405 in Dursley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine 28 und seine Mutter Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam 21. Er hatte mit Ellen Gethin de FitzAlan mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1457 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Hereford, Herefordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Vaughan è nato il nel 1405 nel Dursley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Ellen Gethin de FitzAlan. Morì nel 1457, nel Hereford, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Vaughanが1405年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアダルスリーで生まれた時，父Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardineは28歳，母Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gamは21歳であった。彼はEllen Gethin de FitzAlanとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1457年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Vaughan(이)가 1405년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 뒤르슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Ellen Gethin de FitzAlan(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1457년 영국 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Dursley, Gloucestershire, England, Unite: Dursley, Glevum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Vaughan nasceu em 1405, em Dursley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Ellen Gethin de FitzAlan. Ele faleceu em 1457, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Vaughan родился в 1405 г. в местности дурсли, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, 21. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Ellen Gethin de FitzAlan. Он умер в 1457 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Vaughan nació en 1405, en Dursley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Roger Vaughan Of Bredwardine, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Ellen Gethin de FitzAlan. Murió en 1457, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años.
